hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*(just (test|typecheck|lint|check)|cargo (test|clippy)|(pnpm|npm|yarn) test)' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\| *tee '; then mkdir -p /tmp/kemora-validation; echo 'BLOCK: Test/validation runs are slow — pipe through tee so you can grep the log later instead of re-running. Retry as:  <command> 2>&1 | tee /tmp/kemora-validation/<name>.log  then grep that file for what you need.' >&2; exit 2; fi
